creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey Li-Wen,

I cannot reproduce the build failure in a 14.1-RELASE amd64 poudriere jail. Could you try setting MAKE_UNSAFE_JOBS=yes in your build? I removed that from the submitted patches I committed earlier today because I did not see the need for this setting. Perhaps it was actually fixing the build on some systems...
